message:
fix(polyfills): implement crypto keys, brotli, networkInterfaces + fix crashes

Crypto module:
- Implement createPrivateKey for Ed25519/X25519 keys (raw, Buffer, JWK)
- Implement createPublicKey for Ed25519/X25519 keys (raw, Buffer, JWK)

Compression module:
- Implement pure Zig brotli compression using stored-block format
- Implement brotli decompression for stored-block format
- No external library dependencies (works on WASM)

OS module:
- Implement networkInterfaces() using getifaddrs() on native platforms
- Fix memory corruption bug: use per-interface array index instead of global
- Fix double-free bug: only free JS values when not transferring ownership

Build fixes:
- Fix ambiguous compressPtr reference in zig_runtime.zig
- Remove pointless variable discards in runtime.zig
